overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night with dense fog. The scene features vibrant neon signage in cyan and red, futuristic vehicles, towering buildings with large digital billboards, and wet pavement reflections. The player follows a pedestrian through covered walkways and open intersections.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: metal overhang structure covering the walkway with industrial piping
vertical cyan neon sign with japanese characters
large vertical digital screen displaying a character portrait
building facade with illuminated SERVICE signage in red and white

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial walkway with a metal roof overhead. Bright cyan neon signs in Japanese characters line the left side while a digital billboard displays a character portrait ahead. The pavement is wet and reflective. A pedestrian walks ahead in the distance.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with visible crosswalk stripes
black futuristic sedan drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the intersection following the pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection
continuing to walk across the crosswalk ahead of the camera

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall black pole with traffic signals and speed limit 40 sign

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk following a pedestrian. A black futuristic car drives through the intersection from the right. The digital billboard is now visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with intense red neon commercial signage

events.description: passing bright red neon SMOKING sign creates intense red illumination on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk passing commercial establishments with bright neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking ahead maintaining distance on the sidewalk

entered.detail: intense bright red neon sign reading SMOKING with glowing border
dark concrete building wall with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk next to a dark building facade. An intense red neon SMOKING sign on the right bathes the area in red light. The wet pavement reflects the neon glow. The pedestrian continues walking ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching large digital billboard with palm trees

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward the large billboard area with palm trees

notable_agents.action: walking toward the crosswalk ahead near the billboard

tall palm tree silhouetted against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: Moving toward a more open area where a massive NiCola billboard dominates the view ahead. Palm trees become visible on the left side. The street is wet with reflections of the billboard and ambient light. A pedestrian walks ahead toward the crosswalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open intersection with massive billboard and elevated highway structure

events.description: slows down and stops in the middle of intersection to look around at surroundings
multiple futuristic cars drive through the intersection from various directions

agents.ego_description: standing in the intersection observing the surroundings and watching passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black car driving slowly through the intersection in front of the camera
car with headlights on approaching from the distance under the elevated highway

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure with support pillars

segments.scene_description: Standing in the center of a large open intersection surrounded by fog. The massive NiCola billboard is prominently visible ahead with palm trees flanking the sides. An elevated highway ramp rises on the right. Several futuristic cars drive through the intersection as the camera observes the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, moving from a sheltered commercial corridor into a vast, fog-shrouded intersection. It begins under a metal roof lined with cyan neon signage and digital portraits, following a distant pedestrian across wet, reflective pavement. As the camera emerges from the walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection where a futuristic black car crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk. The path then narrows beside a dark facade, shifting the lighting from cyan to an intense red glow from a neon smoking sign before expanding again toward a massive NiCola billboard and scattered palm trees. Finally, the camera comes to a halt in the center of a large, foggy plaza, observing futuristic traffic flow beneath an elevated highway ramp and the towering glow of the digital advertisement.
